description: Style Note euroluxe understands men. Their range of strong and refreshing perfumes is the perfect antidote to the summer heat. Keeping yourself refreshed and smelling good is easy with these perfumes.  Product Details Euroluxe Frank for Men is a spray perfume which comes in an orange glass flask with a steel top Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyesSize 100 mlStyle Note  Euroluxe understands men.
